svg.title: Cloud Resume Challenge Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing user request flow through Route 53, CloudFront, S3, API Gateway, Lambda, and DynamoDB, with GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user request reach the website?')
sendPrompt('What does Route 53 do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudFront do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the S3 bucket?')
sendPrompt('What does API Gateway do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the Lambda function do?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('What do the GitHub Actions workflows do?')
